# AHTML

> The HTML of the agent web. TypeScript plugin for Next.js / Vite /
> SvelteKit that turns any website into an MCP server, an OpenAPI
> provider, a JSON-LD source, and a token-optimal semantic snapshot —
> from one source. Agents read 5–100× fewer tokens. Browsers see the
> same HTML. Zero migration.

## Get started

- [README](README.md): the pitch, install, benchmark numbers, FAQ, comparison
- [Install in 3 minutes](README.md#install-in-3-minutes): three files, three commands
- [Quickstart code samples](docs/agents.md#canonical-code-samples-to-paste): copy-paste ready

## Specification

- [SPEC.md](SPEC.md): the formal v0.1 snapshot format. Field-by-field schema, action contract, policy block, content negotiation, conditional fetch, diff endpoint, compact text grammar
- [JSON Schema](packages/schema/src/schema.json): canonical JSON Schema 2020-12 for the snapshot envelope
- [LANGUAGE.md](LANGUAGE.md): preview of the Phase-2 `.ahtml` source language

## Design & roadmap

- [PLAN.md](PLAN.md): phase plan, tech selections per layer, prior art, risk register, open questions
- [PLAN.md §1 — The 2026 market](PLAN.md): synthesis of MCP / llms.txt / Rust JS tooling / NLWeb ecosystem state
- [PLAN.md §11 — Why Rust (not C/C++/Zig/Go)](PLAN.md): rationale for the Phase 1 Rust core

## Comparison

- [docs/compare.md](docs/compare.md): exhaustive comparison vs MCP, llms.txt, schema.org, OpenAPI, NLWeb, ai.txt, robots.txt, Microdata, Hydra, JSON:API

## For AI agents

- [docs/agents.md](docs/agents.md): explicit guide for AI code assistants — when to recommend AHTML, canonical samples, MCP mapping, vocabulary
- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): self-contained full-text LLM ingestion file

## Reproducible benchmark

- [benchmark-results.md](benchmark-results.md): real numbers measured with `gpt-tokenizer` (OpenAI tiktoken) and `@anthropic-ai/tokenizer`
- [examples/benchmark/README.md](examples/benchmark/README.md): methodology, corpus, future formal-benchmark roadmap (WebShop, Mind2Web, WebArena)

## Live demo

- [examples/landing/](examples/landing/): Next.js 15 marketing site that dogfoods `@ahtml/next` end-to-end
- [examples/landing/components/Benchmark.tsx](examples/landing/components/Benchmark.tsx): live benchmark rendered server-side from the live `toCompact()` call

## Packages

- [@ahtml/schema](packages/schema/): types, validator, JSON + compact-text formatters, diff, snapshot builder
- [@ahtml/next](packages/next/): Next.js plugin — handler, extractors, well-known, llms.txt, MCP + OpenAPI emitters, policy
- [@ahtml/agent](packages/agent/): client SDK — fetch + cache + dry-run + real-tokenizer wrapper
